channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: EPA head Lee Zeldin defends decision to revoke "endangerment finding" on greenhouse gases
item.description: EPA administrator Lee Zeldin spoke to CBS News' Weijia Jiang about the Trump administration's announcement to revoke what's known as the "endangerment...

item.title: Johnson calls DOJ surveillance of members reviewing Epstein files not 'appropriate'
item.description: Jayapal said lawmakers need to be assured the DOJ "is not spying on us."

item.title: Southwest says it is making adjustments after launching new boarding process
item.description: Southwest Airlines says its making adjustments to its boarding process two weeks after the discount carrier switched to assigned seating. Officials wi...

item.title: Grieving families press Congress on aviation safety reforms after midair collision near DC
WATCH: Dogs take on the Winter Games
item.description: As the real Winter Games take place thousands of miles away in Italy, two dogs brought it home in the U.S., delivering gold-medal-worthy performances.

item.title: Border czar hails a ‘safer’ Minnesota as he says the state’s immigration crackdown is over
item.description: The Trump administration says it is ending its massive immigration crackdown in Minnesota after weeks of angry mass protests, thousands of arrests and...

item.title: Search for Nancy Guthrie now seeks nearby security videos from the month before she vanished
Americans paid nearly 90% of Trump's 2025 tariffs, new analysis found
item.description: Americans, not foreign exporters, shouldered nearly the costs from the Trump administration's tariffs last year, according to the New York Fed.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Gloves among 'several items of evidence' recovered
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: Southwest's new boarding process off to bumpy start
item.description: Some travelers are finding they don't have storage above their seats when they get on the plane because early boarders are taking up the overhead bins...

item.title: WATCH: NHL stars return to Olympic hockey for 1st time in 12 years
item.description: The U.S. men's hockey team begins its quest for Olympic gold on Thursday as NHL stars return to the winter games for the first time since 2014.

item.title: Mexico could be at risk of losing its measles elimination status
item.description: Mexico could be at risk of losing its measles elimination status as the virus continues to spread across the country.

item.title: American Chloe Kim wins silver in women's halfpipe, misses Olympic three-peat
item.description: Chloe Kim has fallen short in her bid to become the first Olympic snowboarder to win three consecutive gold medals.
